title: Modern Christmas Party Supplies (Christmas Tree Shaped Appetizer Plates - Pack of 8)
features: (8) 21cm Christmas Tree Shaped Modern Christmas Paper Plates
This modern Christmas party tableware is perfect for an elegant Christmas party or holiday party.
Pair with other modern Christmas tableware and decorations to complete your party theme.
description: Celebrate the season with these festive green modern Christmas tree-shaped dessert plates. Measuring 8.25 inches, each plate is designed in the shape of a contemporary Christmas tree, featuring a rich green color that adds a stylish touch to your holiday table. Perfect for serving desserts, appetizers, or holiday treats, these plates bring a chic and festive flair to Christmas parties and seasonal gatherings. Crafted from sturdy paper, they offer both durability and convenience, making post-party cleanup a breeze. With a pack of 8, these plates are ideal for creating a modern and festive atmosphere at your next holiday celebration.
